stories.title: PGF Nationals Opens TODAY — Week One Begins in Irvine
stories.angle: After weeks of previewing, the tournament is here. The fields at Great Park are live, 72 teams are competing, and ESPN cameras are coming for the championships. The summer's biggest grassroots stage is open.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
PGF Nationals opens TODAY at Great Park in Irvine, CA.

72 teams. 22 states. 18U and 16U Premier.

Championships on ESPNU and ESPN+. Sept. 1 recruiting window = 43 days.

The biggest grassroots tournament in softball is here. #PGFNationals #softball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Day 1 of PGF Nationals is underway.

72 teams competing across Great Park Irvine and four other SoCal venues.

For Class of 2028 players — coaches can't call yet. But they are absolutely watching.

43 days to September 1. Every at-bat counts. #PGFNationals #softball

article.headline: 72 Teams. 22 States. The PGF Nationals Are Finally Here.

stories.title: AUSL Final Day Tomorrow — No. 1 Seed Race Reaches Its Last Chapter
stories.angle: The AUSL regular season ends tomorrow. One game left — and whoever finishes on top gets the easiest path to the ABC Championship. The race is as close as it has ever been this late in the season.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
AUSL regular season ends TOMORROW.

Utah Talons hold the No. 1 seed — and No. 1 = direct bye to the ABC Championship at Davis Diamond.

No. 2 vs. No. 3 play a win-or-go-home game July 23.

One day left to change everything. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: One Day Left. The AUSL's No. 1 Seed Race Is Almost Over.

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

stories.title: Megan Grant and Maya Brady Are Tied — Two Former Bruins Lead the AUSL in Home Runs
stories.angle: Two former Bruins, now on different teams, tied for the AUSL home run lead. The college connection makes this the league's most compelling individual matchup with two games left.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Megan Grant: 8 AUSL HRs.
Maya Brady: 8 AUSL HRs.

They were UCLA teammates. Now they're tied for the pro softball HR lead with two games left in the regular season.

Who finishes on top? #AUSL #softball

article.headline: They Were Teammates at UCLA. Now They're Tied for the AUSL Home Run Lead.

stories.title: NiJaree Canady Watch — She Didn't Pitch Again. What Comes Next?
stories.angle: The No. 2 pick didn't pitch in Friday's game, and the regular season ends Monday. Two starts remain on the possible schedule. The Canady comeback arc isn't resolved yet — and the final game is its last chapter before the offseason.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
NiJaree Canady did not pitch in Friday's Texas-Portland game.

Ally Carda started. Aliyah Binford relieved. The Volts won 7-2.

One game left Monday. The No. 2 pick still hasn't found her groove.

The Canady comeback story doesn't have an ending yet. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: NiJaree Canady Didn't Pitch Friday. One Start Remains Before the Offseason.

stories.title: 6 Days to Davis Diamond — AUSL Championship Guide
stories.angle: For fans who have just discovered the AUSL through the ABC broadcast announcement, this is the complete guide: format, venue, and why July 25 is a historic date for women's professional sports.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
6 days to the AUSL Championship at Davis Diamond, Texas A&M.

Game 1 is on ABC — the first professional softball game ever on network TV.

Play-in: July 23. Championship: July 25-27.

History is six days away. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: Six Days to Davis Diamond. Here's Your Complete AUSL Championship Guide.
